tools.name: finder_open_path
tools.description: Open a folder or file in Finder.

path.description: Absolute path to the file or folder to open

invoke.script: tell application "Finder" to open POSIX file "{{path}}"

tools.name: finder_reveal_file
tools.description: Reveal a file or folder in Finder (scroll to and highlight it).

path.description: Absolute path to the file or folder to reveal

invoke.script: tell application "Finder" to reveal POSIX file "{{path}}"
tell application "Finder" to empty the trash

tools.name: finder_get_desktop_path
tools.description: Get the path to the user's Desktop folder.

invoke.script: return (path to desktop folder) as string
